content:
@Danilo Krummrich I'm trying to run rusttest and seeing failures in the string tests - these are notably the ones that allocate memory.

I see you implemented a userspace allocator in https://lore.kernel.org/all/20241004154149.93856-8-dakr@kernel.org but it doesn't seem to work for me: https://gist.github.com/tamird/b1659066d6021dd9da0ffbae6755eb91

Any ideas on how to debug? It still works for you locally, yeah?
Correction: allocator_test does work, it just fails to allocate. Probably because I'm on macOS. Investigating.
